title: lotus stipularis
intro: Lotus stipularis, also known as the Himalayan lotus, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the Nelumbo genus. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lotus stipularis include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, with its roots and leaves being used for medicinal purposes.
